seoTitle: Warooka vs Warramboo — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Warooka and Warramboo. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Warooka and Warramboo.
heading: Warooka vs Warramboo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Warooka, South Australia and Warramboo, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Warramboo has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Warooka (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Warooka or Warramboo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Warooka has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Warramboo scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Warooka scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Warramboo scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Warooka or Warramboo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Warramboo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
